calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Bondonno for and with George Gilbert (Petitoner). Lacy White (Respondent).

Counsel reported that the parties have worked out a resolution of the issues. Terms of the agreement were placed on the record. Mrs. White will vacate the apartment tomorrow (August 9, 2012). Mrs. White will drop the complaint that she filed with the Rent Board with regard to her tenancy in 1650 Grant Avenue, Apt. 2, San Francisco and not re-file any complaint. Mrs. White agreed that Mr. Gilbert does not owe her any money for security deposit or interest. Both parties agreed to the settlement. Matter is dismissed subject to the Court retaining jurisdiction under CCP 664.6 to enforce settlement agreement.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Continued To Aug-08-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: All parties were sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

Appearances: George Gilbert (Petitioner in Pro Per).

The Respondent has not been served. Mr. Gilbert's Request for Continue Hearing and Reissue Temporary Restraining Order is granted (order for the same signed in open court). The Request for Restraining Order was continued to August 8, 2012 at 1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR#5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.
